task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map to Three Mile Island Nuclear Generating Station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on an island in the Susquehanna River (approx 40.153°N, 76.725°W), potentially labeled 'Three Mile Island'.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a circular overlay centered on the facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible circular polygon or outline drawn on the map centered on the nuclear station.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the circle radius to 10 miles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog, measurement tool, or sidebar info showing the radius is set to '10 miles', '10.0 mi', or approximately '16,093 meters'.

task_completion.description: Agent names the feature 'TMI Emergency Planning Zone'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'TMI Emergency Planning Zone' is visible in a Name field, properties dialog, or the Places sidebar.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the feature to 'My Places'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item 'TMI Emergency Planning Zone' is listed specifically under the 'My Places' folder in the application sidebar.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the feature to the specified KML file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog or file manager window showing the file 'evacuation_zone.kml' being saved to or present in '/home/ga/'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the GIS application GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth) interface (menus, map, sidebar) rather than a terminal-only approach.

integrity.description: Agent creates the KML via the application, not by writing XML code manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window is the mapping software, not a text editor or IDE writing KML/XML tags.

integrity.description: Agent manually defines the zone properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent adjusting properties (radius, center) via dialogs, not simply opening a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Three Mile Island Nuclear Generating Station (40.153368, -76.725006). Target Radius: 10.0 miles. Target Name: 'TMI Emergency Planning Zone'. Expected Output File: '/home/ga/evacuation_zone.kml'.
